name: Friend to Enemy
original_name: ฟ้า/ทาน/ตะวัน
overview: Weiha, Tawan and Nithan are best friends. While the three of them spent some fun times together; Weiha and Tawan both have more feelings for Nithan than just friends. But one day, suddenly, both Weiha's and Tawan's mothers die. Due to their simultaneous and mysterious deaths, Weiha and Tawan were separated from each other. How will the bond between the three friends change amid difficult life challenges? Will the friendship between Weiha and Tawan, who are in love with Nithan, turn into a three-way love triangle?

trailers.title: "ฟ้า ทาน ตะวัน"เมื่อปมความแค้นจากรุ่นพ่อ สู่จุดแตกหักในรุ่นลูก เสาร์-อาทิตย์ 21.30น. เริ่ม24 ก.ย.นี้
